actions.name: delete_site_redirect_by_id
actions.risk: DELETE /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/redirects/{siteRedirectId} (Delete a site redirect) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: create_site_mcp_server
actions.risk: POST /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/mcp-servers (Add a new MCP server configuration to a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: update_site_mcp_server_by_id
actions.risk: PATCH /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/mcp-servers/{siteMcpServerId} (Update an MCP server configuration for a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: delete_site_mcp_server_by_id
actions.risk: DELETE /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/mcp-servers/{siteMcpServerId} (Delete a site MCP server) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: create_site_channel
actions.risk: POST /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/channels (Create a new GitBook Agent channel for a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: update_site_channel_by_id
actions.risk: PATCH /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/channels/{siteChannelId} (Update a GitBook Agent channel for a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: delete_site_channel_by_id
actions.risk: DELETE /orgs/{organizationId}/sites/{siteId}/channels/{siteChannelId} (Delete a GitBook Agent channel from a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: dns_revalidate_custom_hostname
actions.risk: PATCH /custom-hostnames/{hostname} (Revalidate a custom hostname DNS) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: remove_custom_hostname
actions.risk: DELETE /custom-hostnames/{hostname} (Remove a custom hostname) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: ads_update_site
actions.risk: PATCH /ads/sites/{siteId} (Update the Ads configuration for a site) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: resolve_published_content_by_url
actions.risk: POST /urls/published (Resolve a URL of a published content.) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: install_git_sync_provider_on_target
actions.risk: POST /git/installations (Install a Git Sync provider on a target) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: update_git_sync_installation_by_id
actions.risk: PATCH /git/installations/{installationId} (Update a Git Sync installation configuration) executes a live GitBook API operation.

actions.name: uninstall_git_sync_installation
actions.risk: DELETE /git/installations/{installationId} (Uninstall a Git Sync installation) executes a live GitBook API operation.
